build.arx_lock_note: canonical .arx held by attended acad.exe; relinked to versioned target; AutoCAD NOT killed; .crx is canonical/fresh and is what accoreconsole loads headless

design_note_commands: design doc named CADAGENT_START/STOP/STATUS/PUMP; as-built folds START+PUMP into the blocking CADAGENT_PUMP command, ADDS CADAGENT_STATUS (non-blocking health/config report), exposes STOP as the in-band live.stop frame
protocol: 4-byte little-endian uint32 length prefix + UTF-8 JSON body, both directions

headless_verified.harness: runs/m07_pump_test/run_m07_pump_test.ps1 (accoreconsole + pipe client; staged copy; original golden read-only)
headless_verified.live.status: ok (pump running, host_mode coreconsole, has_database true, modelspace_entities 21747)
headless_verified.live.inspect_entity: ok by handle: 11935 -> AcDbLine(start/end); 12B4C -> AcDbCircle(center/radius 25); 19166 -> AcDbText(text); FFFFFFFF -> not_found (honest miss)
headless_verified.live.apply_patch: disabled (reason + governor pointer + original_dwg read_only) -- section 5 write guard
headless_verified.attended_only_ops: live.inspect_selection/highlight_handles/clear_highlight/zoom_to_handles/render_view -> attended_only (interactive_editor_required true, exact GUI/graphics reason); no fake success
headless_verified.CADAGENT_STATUS: ok (v1 JSON printed headless: build_id, pipe_name, timeout_ms, host_mode, serving false, 12 supported_ops, write_policy disabled_use_m05_staged_governor)

protocol_unit_test: tests/unit/test_pump_frame_codec.py (11 tests, always runs, no AutoCAD; 0-len + >1MiB rejection + exact-1MiB accept + loop ordering + UTF-8 평면도)
source_guard_test: tests/unit/test_pump_shutdown_and_deep_native_source.py (16 tests; shutdown invariants + deep-native presence + M07 op strings)

thread_safety.model: single-threaded on AutoCAD document/command thread (ACRX_CMD_MODAL); no worker thread; DllMain/acrxEntryPoint start no threads; overlapped I/O gives async I/O without a second thread
thread_safety.shutdown_path: InterlockedExchange(gPumpServing,0) -> FlushFileBuffers -> DisconnectNamedPipe -> CloseHandle(evt,pipe); kUnloadAppMsg disables reactor+overrule, removeGroup(ARIADNE_NATIVE), acrxUnloadModule(.dbx)

self_terminating: overlapped connect/read/write with WaitForSingleObject timeout + CancelIo -> can never hang a headless session
write_guard_section5: live.apply_patch hard-returns disabled; pump opens no db for write; never saves; mutation only via M05 staged governor (router apply_staged on staged copy, original read-only)
attended_blocker: acad.exe PID 49460 running but no automation channel from this session and must not be disrupted; identical .crx code path verified headless via accoreconsole CADAGENT_PUMP
